title: Hello WorldVyop: The Future of AI Accounting in Bharat
excerpt: A deep dive into how voice-first AI is helping small businesses manage bills.
content:
Revolutionizing Retail

Vyop is changing the game by allowing shopkeepers to create bills just by speaking. This reduces friction and increases productivity.
